prompt: Shot 1 of 6 for a Shiftway social ad. Move from scheduling chaos to clarity.
scene: top-down desk with paper schedule cards transforming into a clean weekly digital board; no people
subject: schedule cards and modern scheduling interface
action: beat 1 (0-1.5s) scattered cards overlap; beat 2 (1.5-3s) cards align into columns; beat 3 (3-4s) clean board locks in
style: premium software ad, crisp UI graphics
constraints: no real people, no copyrighted logos, text must remain legible
negative: no warped text, no flicker, no heavy motion blur

prompt: Shot 2 of 6 for a Shiftway social ad. Show dedicated workspace setup.
scene: clean onboarding screen with business name and slug field
subject: workspace slug availability and dedicated URL
action: beat 1 (0-1.2s) slug is typed; beat 2 (1.2-2.8s) status flips to available; beat 3 (2.8-4s) workspace URL confirms
constraints: no people, no external brands, keep text centered and readable
negative: no jitter, no fast cuts, no illegible UI

prompt: Shot 3 of 6 for a Shiftway social ad. Show schedule command center.
scene: weekly schedule hub with status chips and open shift lane
subject: publish state, open shifts, and schedule controls
action: beat 1 (0-1.3s) week columns appear; beat 2 (1.3-2.7s) publish status flips to published; beat 3 (2.7-4s) open shift counter updates
camera: slight lateral pan across week grid
constraints: no people, keep typography large and legible
negative: no clutter, no text collisions, no strobe

prompt: Shot 4 of 6 for a Shiftway social ad. Show operational request flow.
scene: three cards in sequence: swap request, time-off approval, availability conflict warning
subject: approval workflow for shift operations
action: beat 1 (0-1.3s) swap request card enters; beat 2 (1.3-2.6s) time-off approval card enters; beat 3 (2.6-4s) availability warning confirms
camera: front-facing UI cards with smooth match cuts
palette: white, graphite, teal, orange warning accent
constraints: no people, no external logos, text high contrast
negative: no rapid camera shake, no text distortion

prompt: Shot 5 of 6 for a Shiftway social ad. Show team execution stack.
scene: split-screen product panels for tasks, messages, invites, and notifications
subject: daily operations in one place
action: beat 1 (0-1.3s) tasks panel checks complete; beat 2 (1.3-2.6s) messages and invite panel animate in; beat 3 (2.6-4s) notification icons pulse
constraints: no people, no copyrighted characters, keep text readable
negative: no flicker, no noisy background, no tiny text

prompt: Shot 6 of 6 for a Shiftway social ad. End with direct call to action.
scene: minimal product lockup with signup CTA on clean background
subject: Shiftway logo wordmark and trial CTA
action: beat 1 (0-1.2s) logo resolves cleanly; beat 2 (1.2-2.8s) CTA card slides in; beat 3 (2.8-4s) final lock frame holds
constraints: no people, no external logos, strong legibility
negative: no blur, no jitter, no extra text
